tests.name: graph view provider listener bridge does not analyze twice when the same webview listener is registered twice and refresh is clicked once
graph view provider listener bridge stores updated user groups back onto the provider source
graph view provider listener bridge routes OPEN_IN_EDITOR through the provider webview methods
graph view provider listener bridge reprocesses plugin-owned files with a scoped refresh when invalidated files are known
graph view provider listener bridge skips a full reanalysis when plugin-owned invalidation reports no concrete files
graph view provider listener bridge stores ready state updates back onto the provider source
graph view provider listener bridge wires read-context values into the captured listener context
graph view provider listener bridge wires plugin-context bridges into the captured listener context
graph view provider listener bridge wires default settings-context dependency bridges into the captured listener context
graph view provider listener bridge wires the default undo-execution dependency into the settings context
graph view provider listener bridge does not enumerate proposed workspace getters while building default dependencies
graph view provider listener settings context reads config values from the codegraphy settings namespace
graph view provider listener settings context persists mode updates and resets settings through the undoable reset action
graph view provider listener settings context persists disabled plugin updates silently to avoid redundant refresh work
graph view provider listener settings context persists filter and max-file changes silently so they do not auto-reindex
graph view provider listener settings context keeps show-orphans updates on the normal configuration event path
graph view provider listener settings context wires reset callbacks to resend settings, store node size mode, and reanalyze
graph view provider listener settings context reprocesses only invalidated plugin files when the pipeline reports affected files
graph view provider listener settings context skips reanalysis when plugin invalidation reports no affected files
graph view provider listener settings context falls back to full reanalysis when plugin invalidation is unavailable
graph view provider listener settings context forwards graph-control callbacks and exposes the current mode getters
graph view webview message listener stores user group updates from primary dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener recomputes and sends groups after storing user group updates
graph view webview message listener stores filter pattern updates from primary dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener does not reanalyze the graph for unrelated settings updates
graph view webview message listener stores ready state updates from plugin dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener ignores duplicate WEBVIEW_READY messages from the same listener
graph view webview message listener replaces the previous listener when the same webview is wired again
graph view webview message listener does not store ready state for handled plugin messages without a ready flag
graph view webview message listener ignores messages not handled by the primary or plugin dispatchers
graph view provider listener primary actions delegates file-oriented provider actions
graph view provider listener primary actions delegates provider state and timeline actions
graph view provider listener primary actions uses dependency-backed wrappers for group persistence and dialogs
graph view provider listener primary actions uses vscode file system wrappers for directory and file copies
graph view provider listener primary actions delegates provider messaging, grouping, and view actions
graph/keyboardListener runs keyboard effects with the current graph node ids
graph/keyboardListener ignores shortcuts while focus is inside editable targets
graph/keyboardListener opens selected nodes through the provided node opener
graph/keyboardListener ignores plain a without modifier keys
graph/keyboardListener treats meta+z as an undo shortcut
graph/keyboardListener clears selection when escape requests the clear-selection effect
graph/keyboardListener does not prevent default when the resolved command allows native behavior
graph view provider listener defaults routes codegraphy configuration through repo settings and other sections through vscode workspace
graph view provider listener defaults delegates default helper functions through the local adapters
graph view provider listener defaults creates the provider context and forwards it to the shared webview listener
graph view provider listener plugin context returns safe defaults when analyzer and workspace state are unavailable
graph view provider listener plugin context reads plugin state and mutates provider state
graph view provider listener plugin context notifies the analyzer, exposes plugin APIs, and logs plugin context failures
graph view provider message dispatch updates user groups and filter patterns from a handled primary message
graph view provider message dispatch skips group update side effects when a handled primary message omits optional fields
graph view provider message dispatch stores ready state from a handled plugin message when primary dispatch does not handle the message
graph view provider message dispatch ignores plugin ready updates when the plugin result is unhandled or omits ready state
graphView/webview/providerMessages/settingsContext/config returns the current CodeGraphy configuration and persists silent keys without notifications
graphView/webview/providerMessages/settingsContext/config persists dag and node-size mode keys silently even though they are not part of the shared key set
graphView/webview/providerMessages/settingsContext/config uses the normal configuration update path for non-silent keys
graphView/webview/providerMessages/pluginApis routes plugin api lookups and webview-ready notifications through the registry
graphView/webview/providerMessages/pluginApis returns undefined when the registry is unavailable
graphView/webview/providerMessages/pluginApis returns undefined when the analyzer exists but its registry does not
graph view provider settings context plugin files refreshes only the invalidated plugin files when any are reported
graph view provider settings context plugin files skips all follow-up work when invalidation returns an empty file list
graph view provider settings context plugin files falls back to full analysis when plugin invalidation is unavailable
graph view provider listener read context reads provider state and resolves graph targets from the current graph data
graphView/webview/providerMessages/pluginState updates the mutable provider state slices
